# Vael
> AI software development agency. We build custom AI apps, agents, and automation for businesses, from MVP to production, typically shipping in six weeks.

## What we do
- AI Agents & Assistants: custom assistants, chatbots, and RAG systems trained on your data
- AI-Powered Apps: web and mobile products with AI features at the core
- Business Automation: automations that remove repetitive work from teams
- Custom Software & MVPs: bespoke systems, internal tools, and validated MVPs

## Pricing
- Launch (MVP): from $10,000, 3 to 5 weeks
- Build (full product): $25,000 to $75,000, 6 to 10 weeks
- Scale (complex systems): $75,000+, 10 to 16 weeks
- Monthly retainer: $2,000 to $5,000+ per month
All quotes are fixed price, agreed before work begins. No hourly billing.

## How we work
Four phases: Discovery and Strategy (week 1), Design and Planning (weeks 1 to 2), Development and Build (weeks 2 to 5), Launch and Support (week 5 onward). Clients own all code and infrastructure with no vendor lock-in.

- Homepage: https://vael.studio/
- Case studies: https://vael.studio/work
- Blog: https://vael.studio/blog
- Start a project: https://vael.studio/order

## Contact
Start a project at https://vael.studio/order or email hello@vael.studio
